# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { Application, Request } from "oak";

const app = new Application();

app.use(async (ctx) => {
  const modulePath = ctx.request.hasQuery()
    ? ctx.request.query.get("module")
    : Deno.env.get("MODULE_PATH");

  if (!modulePath) {
    ctx.response.status = 400;
    ctx.response.body = "Missing module path.";
    return;
  }

  try {
    const module = await import(modulePath);
    await module.default(ctx);
  } catch (error) {
    ctx.response.status = 500;
    ctx.response.body = `Error loading module: ${error}`;
  }
});

addEventListener("fetch", (event) => {
  event.respondWith(app.handle(new Request(event.request)));
});
